changeSet.author: Manuel

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result FROM public.utm_module_group WHERE module_id = 35

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.utm_module_group_configuration ( group_id, conf_key, conf_value, conf_name, conf_description, conf_data_type, conf_required, conf_options, conf_visibility ) SELECT g.id, 'aws_log_group_name', '', 'Log Group Name', 'Configure Aws Log Group Name', 'text', true, null, null FROM public.utm_module_group g WHERE g.module_id = 35;
